---
title: ""
author: ""
date: 
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
editor: visual
---

## Title:

## Team

## Background

-   

## Study population

## Hypothesis

## Objective

1.  Characterize

2.  Identify factors associated with

3.  

## Primary outcome

## Secondary outcome

## Variables of interest

-Demographic and clinical characteristics: race, ethnicity, bmi, gravida, para, insurance, primary language, social driver for health, comorbidities

-characteristics:

-characteristics:

## References

## 

## Discussions
